title: Include Display Text for Email Column
excerpt: When you have an automation that states: "When Status Changes, move item to “another board,”  any display text for the email column is not transferred, only the email address.

posts.author: rondis (Rondi Schei)
posts.cookedHtml: When you have an automation that states: "When Status Changes, move item to “another board,” any display text for the email column is not transferred, only the email address.
